settings.title: Customer Service Operations
settings.content:
How do I contact customer service?
You can reach us via the Contact Us page or by emailing our support team directly. Our CS team will get back to you as soon as they can.

settings.title: Shipping Operations
settings.content:
How long does shipping take?
Standard shipping takes 5–7 business days. Express shipping takes 2–3 business days.

settings.title: Shipping & Rates
settings.content:
How much does shipping cost?
Shipping rates are calculated at checkout based on your location and the weight of your order.

settings.title: Returns & Exchanges
settings.content:
What is your return policy?
We accept returns within 30 days of purchase. Items must be unworn and in original packaging.

settings.heading: FAQ
settings.description: Please use the 'CONTACT US' button on our website or email us and our CS team will get back to you as soon as they can.
